<!--
Thank you for opening an issue. Use the repository's Bug report, Feature
request, or Question template when possible. Search existing issues first and
remove passwords, tokens, personal data, and other sensitive information.
-->

## Summary

Describe the problem, request, or question clearly.

## AutoClicker Version or Commit

Enter the release version or commit hash you are using.

## Windows Version

Enter your Windows edition and version or build number if known.

## Details

For a bug, include reproducible steps, expected behavior, and actual behavior.
For a feature, explain the user problem, proposed behavior, and alternatives.
For a question, explain what you are trying to accomplish and what you tried.

## Additional Context

Add relevant screenshots or other details after removing private information.
